items: Output names a specific display font family and a specific body font family, or clearly specifies one family used across roles.
Output proposes a concrete color system with at least three tokens or explicit values covering surface, text, and accent.
Output includes a hero with headline, supporting copy, primary CTA, secondary CTA, and a concrete product-visualization concept.
Output includes social proof or trust indicators near the top of the page.
Output proposes between three and five feature sections with distinct roles or content.
Output includes a workflow or product-story section that explicitly connects alert to resolution.
Output includes a pricing teaser or plan comparison summary.
Output includes a final CTA section.
Output addresses responsive behavior or mobile treatment with at least one specific adaptation.
Output avoids neon cyberpunk AI tropes by explicitly choosing a different visual direction.
